# skip-hire-ai-mcp

> UK Waste Carrier Registration, EA waste codes, hazardous waste consignment notes for skip hire and waste transport operators.

MCP server by MEOK AI Labs. Framework: fastmcp. Transport: stdio.

## Tools
- check_waste_carrier_registration
- ewc_code_lookup
- consignment_note_template
- waste_transfer_note
- duty_of_care_check

## Install
```
pip install skip-hire-ai-mcp
```

## Links
- PyPI: https://pypi.org/project/skip-hire-ai-mcp/
- Docs: https://meok.ai
